changes_tested.db_template_fix: Raw HTTP 403 → clean warning message in DB template
changes_tested.expected_improvement: SSE stream should now contain warning text instead of 403

sse_stream.description: EventStream tab shows headers (Id, Type, Data, Time) but zero rows — no SSE events delivered

results.chat_behavior: Stuck on 'Thinking...' with 'Copilot is responding...' indefinitely
results.response_tab: Failed to load response data (streaming response already consumed)

diagnosis.db_template_fix_effect: NOT RESOLVED — DB template change did not fix SSE streaming
diagnosis.root_cause: Etap returns 200 OK with correct Content-Type (text/event-stream) but sends NO SSE event data in body. GitHub Copilot client waits for SSE events like 'data: {...}\n\n' but receives nothing.
diagnosis.required_fix: Etap must send proper SSE-formatted events: 'data: {"type":"content","body":"warning message"}\n\n' or similar format matching GitHub Copilot's expected SSE protocol
diagnosis.comparison_with_146: Identical behavior — 200 OK, correct headers, empty event stream, infinite Thinking...
